intent: Build a streaming whisper-writer fork (recording -> transcription -> typing as a continuous pipeline).
finding: On 2026-04-14 the user worked on whisper-writer from 21:10 to 00:26 local (Europe/Stockholm), crossing the midnight boundary. The tail of the session shows scope escalation typical of a manic signature: after committing and pushing the streaming work, the user opened a fresh task at 00:24 local ("Now make a slash proposals folder...") before abruptly stopping two minutes later. A second late instance occurred 2026-04-11 where a whisper-writer / plugin-tuning session ran until 23:37 local. Only two past-23:00 instances in the window and Apr 15 was a full rest day, so this is below the recurring-pattern bar. Logging for trend detection only, no action warranted yet.
existing_mitigation: None found. No CLAUDE.md rule, hook, or memory entry addresses session end-time or scope-creep past a cutoff.
